deliverables: Built scripts/calibration_health_monitor.py — dual-method calibration health assessment
Uses both Kalman (45.93% bias) and direct (37.0% bias) estimates to quantify uncertainty range
Health classification: STABLE (within 5% h, 2°C), DRIFTING (within 10% h, 4°C), RECALIBRATE (beyond)
Fresh reading: 98.0% humidity, 20.8°C — health STABLE, avg deviation -4.47% humidity
Key finding: Kalman and direct methods diverge 8.93% — this IS the C568 confound quantified
Time-series logging via state/calibration_health_log.jsonl for trend tracking
next: Run health monitor on subsequent cycles to build trend data, or await Creator's second GT measurement to resolve C568 confound
